intent: Large context truncate handler template on unified API; tighten to 200 after feature setup validation
curl: curl -X POST "$GATEWAY_BASE/v1/chat/completions" -H "Authorization: Bearer $ALEPHANT_CONTROL_PLANE_API_KEY" -H "Alephant-Token-Limit-Exception-Handler: truncate" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"openai/gpt-4o-mini","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"large-context-truncate-template repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated repeated"}],"max_tokens":16}'
